---
name: Claim and test
about: Every issue states one claim and the test that would settle it
title: "[claim] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## The claim

One falsifiable sentence. Examples: "isomer X satisfies the leak condition at
flux Y", "the coincidence gate loses independence under condition Z", "this
derivation step is wrong because W".

## The test

What measurement, calculation, dataset, or derivation settles the claim?
Include numbers, sources (ENSDF, ENDF, NUBASE, a paper), or a script in this
repository that can be run.

## Which part of the theory it touches

Point at the section of README.md, theory/THEORY.md, or the file in gates/,
transport/, or simulator/ that stands or falls with this claim.
